columns.name: HostId
columns.description: Unique host identifier from Qualys VM.

columns.name: IPAddress
columns.description: Primary IP address reported for the host.

columns.name: TrackingMethod
columns.description: Method Qualys uses to track and identify the host.

columns.name: OperatingSystem
columns.description: Operating system details resolved from the Qualys host record.

columns.name: DnsName
columns.description: DNS name associated with the host.

columns.name: NetBios
columns.description: NetBIOS name associated with the host.

columns.name: LastScanDateTime
columns.description: Most recent scan timestamp for the host.

columns.name: LastVMScannedDateTime
columns.description: Most recent VM scan timestamp reported by Qualys.

columns.name: LastVMAuthScannedDateTime
columns.description: Most recent authenticated VM scan timestamp.

columns.name: DetectionList
columns.description: Collection of vulnerability detections reported for the host.
